title: Yushania mairei
taxonomy: Yushania mairei is classified as a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. It is a genus within the subfamily Bambusoideae. Yushania mairei is native to the island of Taiwan. It is a member of the tribe Arundinarieae. The species is a type of evergreen clumping bamboo.
